channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large bag and box blocking pavement, 6th March
item.description:
Large bag and box blocking pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Finsbury Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish has been dumped, 6th March
item.description:
Rubbish has been dumped on the grass patch

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Somersham Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Tree needs reducing, 6th March
item.description:
The tree overhang our property and causes a nuisance. Tree surgeons called round 2 weeks ago but we were out and our car was on the drive. They said they would return but haven’t yet. We would like the tree reduced and branches which overhang our property removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Poverest Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattresses and bed dumped outside ur home and in goose green, 6th March
item.description:
Mattresses and bed frame dumped outside our home and bed frame in goose green

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, East Dulwich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By the recycling bins at James Stewart House., 6th March
item.description:
Reported mattress yesterday. Now there is a sofa, another mattress and a fridge.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dyne Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Large pothole, 6th March
item.description:
A large pothole on Chislehurst Road, Bickley, it’s right by the side of speed hump which means everyone hits it. Someone has put a carpet in it to lessen the damage. It’s really serious and needs urgent attention
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 7 bags of dog foul, 6th March
item.description:
This is an ongoing problem outside the school and surrounding streets and allies, someone is letting there do mess around the streets every day and when they do pick it up they are just throwing the bags on the floor and in the allies

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dansington Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole opening, 6th March
item.description:
Pothole opening right next to bus stop. Can damage tyres.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Pickford Lane, Welling, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked street water drain, 6th March
item.description:
Rubbish blocking drain
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yellow lines required, 6th March
item.description:
On the bend as indicated in the picture the cars parking there are causing a dangerous situation with cars trying to pass up and down the road. Please can some yellow lines be put in on the bend to stop an accident from happening. This also causes problems for the bin lorries when trying to access the bins in Tanglewood Court and generally in this locality

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Brantwood Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 6th March
item.description:
There are several large potholes in the road, which are a danger to traffic, especially motorbikes, which have to swerve to avoid them. The nearest house is number 44 Essex Park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Essex Park, Fallow Corner, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 6th March
item.description:
What looks to be a fishtank filled with stuff, left on the pavement at this location.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes, 6th March
item.description:
There are lime bikes blocking pavement outside BNP in Harewood avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Hayes Place, Marylebone, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 6th March
item.description:
There are several large potholes at the junction of Nether Street and Eversleigh Road Finchley N3

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nether Street, West Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drainage grills missing10 inch deep gully open, 6th March
item.description:
Urgent hazard, can lead to serious injury. I twisted my ankle in the gully which is filled with water so not obvious. Various openings / gaps / holes outside of Tesco toward the cut as well as the train station side of the road opposite.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cornwall Road, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign post has been hit, 6th March
item.description:
Danger to pedestrians

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Friern Barnet Road, Brunswick Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 6th March
item.description:
Child's buggy left on pavement at this location. Has been there for a couple days now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Faversham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping top of Star Lane, 6th March
item.description:
Bad flytipping at the top of Star Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sweeps Lane, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in alley in somersham road, 6th March
item.description:
Res reported fly tipping in alleyway in somersham road leading to the back of the houses that lead onto cyril road. This has already been reported but she wanted me to do this again and put details on. Please can this be removed asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Somersham Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poundland/Tesco construction waste, 6th March
item.description:
On the back alley of previous Poundland and now Tesco still has construction waste left behind. Lange objects that cannot be removed with regular bins are being stored at the very end of the alleyway. Please collect them! The alleyway is overall a dumping ground and waste cumulating there just makes it extremely unpleasant for everyone living here. Alley is the main entrance for homes above the restaurants..
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Frogley Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
